author: @tech_guru
content: React 19 ke naye hooks (use, useOptimistic) frontend development ko poori tarah badal denge. What do you guys think?

replies.author: @frontend_dev
replies.content: Bhai sach mein, boilerplate code bohot kam ho jayega ab.

replies.author: @legacy_coder
replies.content: Par purane projects ko migrate karna dardnaak hoga.

replies.author: @tech_guru
replies.content: Agreed. Migration docs padhne padenge dhang se.

replies.author: @vue_fan
replies.content: Vue.js ne ye sab pehle hi kar diya tha 😂

replies.author: @react_lover
replies.content: Bhai yahan framework war mat shuru kar.

author: @market_bull
content: Nifty 50 aaj phir naye all-time high par hai. Is it a bubble or sustained growth? #StockMarket

replies.author: @bear_trader
replies.content: Retail investors FOMO mein buy kar rahe hain. Correction pakka aayega next month.

replies.author: @long_term_hold
replies.content: Aane do correction, we will buy the dip!

replies.author: @options_king
replies.content: Dip buy karne ke liye capital bhi toh bachni chahiye pehle.

replies.author: @long_term_hold
replies.content: Emergency fund kis din kaam aayega.

author: @sports_addict
content: BCCI ko ab test team mein naye spinners ko chance dena chahiye. Ashwin aur Jadeja legends hain, par future transition zaroori hai.

replies.author: @cricket_stats
replies.content: Domestic circuit mein kaafi achhe left-arm spinners perform kar rahe hain is season.

replies.author: @fan_boy
replies.content: Jab tak WTC final nahi hota, tab tak core team change mat karo.

replies.author: @sports_addict
replies.content: Par away tours par backup ready hona chahiye na.

author: @global_watcher
content: Naye trade agreements se South Asia ki supply chain dynamics puri tarah shift hone wali hai. Manufacturing hubs will relocate.

replies.author: @econ_student
replies.content: India ke liye ye bohot badi FDI opportunity hai agar policies favourable rahin toh.

replies.author: @policy_critic
replies.content: Execution hamesha issue rehta hai humara, policies toh paper par achi hoti hain.

replies.author: @econ_student
replies.content: Is baar PLI schemes ka track record dekho, execution improve hua hai.
